title: euphorbia fontqueriana
intro: Euphorbia fontqueriana, also known as the Font Quer's spurge, is a succulent plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia fontqueriana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
